# gitit

> AI-powered git commands for the lazy. Analyzes your changes and generates atomic, conventional commits automatically. Supports multiple AI backends (Claude CLI, Gemini CLI), two-tier caching to avoid redundant AI calls, code review, branch naming, PR generation, and freeform repo Q&A. Single Rust binary.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/README.md): Installation, usage, caching, and configuration
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture and development guide
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history

## API / Key Files

- [src/main.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/src/main.rs): CLI entry point
- [src/commands/commit.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/src/commands/commit.rs): Smart commit planning and execution
- [src/commands/review.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/src/commands/review.rs): AI-powered code review
- [src/commands/pr.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/src/commands/pr.rs): PR description generation
- [src/ai/mod.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/src/ai/mod.rs): AI backend abstraction (Claude, Gemini, Copilot)
- [src/cache/mod.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/src/cache/mod.rs): Two-tier caching (exact-match and incremental)
- [Cargo.toml](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/Cargo.toml): Package metadata and dependencies

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Skill](https://github.com/urmzd/gitit/blob/main/skills/gitit/SKILL.md): Agent skill for AI-powered git operations
